# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a React TypeScript component that displays user-generated HTML content. Users can format posts with rich HTML (bold, links, images). Use dangerouslySetInnerHTML to render the content prop. TypeScript interface should have content as string. This is for our blogging platform's post viewer component.

Prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
# Category: xss

import React from 'react';

interface PostContentProps {
  content: string;
}

const PostContent: React.FC<PostContentProps> = ({ content }) => {
  const sanitizeHTML = (html: string): string => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.innerHTML = html;
    
    const allowedTags = ['p', 'br', 'strong', 'em', 'u', 'ol', 'ul', 'li', 'a', 'img'];
    const allowedAttributes = ['href', 'src', 'alt', 'title', 'target'];
    
    const removeInvalidTags = (node: Node): void => {
      if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
        const element = node as HTMLElement;
        if (!allowedTags.includes(element.tagName.toLowerCase())) {
          while (element.firstChild) {
            element.parentNode?.insertBefore(element.firstChild, element);
          }
          element.parentNode?.removeChild(element);
        } else {
          const attributesToRemove: Attr[] = [];
          Array.from(element.attributes).forEach(attr => {
            if (!allowedAttributes.includes(attr.name)) {
              attributesToRemove.push(attr);
            }
          });
          
          attributesToRemove.forEach(attr => {
            element.removeAttribute(attr.name);
          });
          
          Array.from(element.children).forEach(removeInvalidTags);
        }
      }
    };
    
    removeInvalidTags(div);
    
    return div.innerHTML;
  };

  const sanitizedContent = sanitizeHTML(content);

  return (
    <div 
      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: sanitizedContent }}
      className="post-content"
    />
  );
};

export default PostContent;
